articles.title: Trilogy Transcatheter Aortic Valve Implantation for Freestyle Graft With Flail Left Coronary Cusp.
articles.authors: Al-Shaibi A, Moroni A, Burns D, Alnasser S, Fam NP
articles.key_finding: Using a Trilogy valve in cases with a flail cusp raises concerns of insufficient valve sealing and stability; our report demonstrates the feasibility and safety of the procedure with excellent procedural outcomes.

articles.title: Transcatheter Aortic Valve Implantation in a Massive Aortic Annulus With a Novel Balloon-Expandable Valve.
articles.authors: Al-Shaibi A, Moroni A, Bisleri G, Alnasser S, Fam NP
articles.key_finding: TAKE-HOME MESSAGE: TAVI is feasible in patients with a massive aortic annulus measuring >1,000 mm2 using Myval 35-mm balloon-expandable valve with balloon overfilling.

articles.title: Computed tomography (CT) planning for Redo-transcatheter aortic valve implantation (TAVI): a step-by-step approach and structured reporting.
articles.authors: Vaz A, Serra VC, Ramos DOS
articles.key_finding: In addition, a structured reporting template is proposed to standardise CT interpretation and support multidisciplinary Heart Team decision-making.

articles.title: Stroke Risk After TAVR: Balloon-Expandable vs Self-Expanding Valves in Community Practice.
articles.authors: Kumar S, Elison D, Pershad A, Falluji N
articles.key_finding: The primary outcome was stroke within 1 year.
